mnemonics: MiCKeS - Motherboard, Internet, Computers, Keyboards, Ethernet, Servers
Green ICT = G - Greener, R - Renewable, I - Innovative, C - Connected, T - Technology
keyPoints: The Industrial Revolution marked the beginning of the modern computer era with Charles Babbage's invention of the Analytical Engine.
The emergence of ICTs in the 1990s revolutionized the way people communicate and access information.
Green ICT aims to reduce the environmental impact of ICTs by promoting sustainable practices and technologies.
